rows.label: qev051508_MSG0001
rows.name:
How are you? Are you in perfect
condition? Is your flesh burning,
and is your soul sharpened?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051508_MSG0003
rows.name:
A warrior like you always dedicates
themselves to battle, living like
an unsheathed blade at all times.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051508_MSG0004
rows.name:
I understand. I lived like that too, and
so did that man— Gi Zang's adoptive parent,
the legendary Hundred-Demon Warrior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051508_MSG0005
rows.name:
Forgive my late introduction.
My name is Zo Ozuchi—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051508_MSG0006
rows.name:
The man who won the Lars Martial Arts
Tournament three times, and the only one to
survive a battle against Gi Zang's old man—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051508_MSG0007
rows.name: And, I am your opponent for the finals![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051508_MSG0008
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]! I never expected to meet a
powerhouse like you again in
a foreign land like this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051508_MSG0009
rows.name:
Heart and soul! Let's bet our
lives and fight! Our lives only
exist for this very moment!![ST:wait ]
